name: x-post-optimizer
description: Write and review X (Twitter) posts grounded in the open-source xai-org/x-algorithm code. Generates drafts in any X format (short, long, thread, reply, quote) and reviews existing drafts against an algorithm-derived checklist. Built around strict separation of [FACT] (verifiable from the repo), [INFERENCE] (logically derivable), and [HEURISTIC] (creator practice without code backing). Deliberately refuses to quote concrete weight multipliers — those are not in the public release.
